audio_identity.overall_style: Recreation of classic Indiana Jones film themes with excellent looping
distinctive_elements: Faithful recreation of classic film themes
Effective looping that doesn't water down effectiveness
Praised for music quality throughout gameplay
Consistent musical presence across most stages
influences: Indiana Jones film soundtracks (Raiders of the Lost Ark, Temple of Doom, Last Crusade)

sources_used: wikipedia - Indiana Jones' Greatest Adventures article
tcrf - The Cutting Room Floor Indiana Jones' Greatest Adventures page
extraction_notes: The available sources contain no documented data on specific track tempos, keys, chord progressions, time signatures, or per-area music parameters. Sources confirm Rudolf Stember as composer and note that music was well-received for its recreation of classic themes with effective looping. No technical audio parameters are documented in the provided sources. The game features 28 areas but no area-specific audio documentation is available.
